scripts.deploy:fan-controller: yarn build:fan-controller && cp -af 45drives-fan-controller/dist/* $HOME/.local/share/cockpit/45drives-fan-controller-test/ && mkdir -p /usr/share/cockpit/45drives-fan-controller/scripts && cp -af 45drives-fan-controller/public/scripts/* /usr/share/cockpit/45drives-fan-controller/scripts/ && chmod +x /usr/share/cockpit/45drives-fan-controller/scripts/*
